title: Valve's Steam Machine captures attention with its launch and DIY alternatives
summary: The console generates news about price, specifications, sales in Japan, and SteamOS compatibility.

title: GTA VI reveals prices, pre-sale, and physical disc-less edition
summary: The highly anticipated Grand Theft Auto installment sparks rumors about bans and PS5 enhancements.

title: Apple increases prices of Mac and iPad due to semiconductor crisis
summary: The increases affect several models, including the MacBook Neo which goes up $400 in the US.

title: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, their first inference chip
summary: The ASIC designed in nine months promises to accelerate inference for language models.

title: AMD launches FSR 4.1 and SDK 2.3 with significant performance improvements
summary: The upscaling technology shows gains of up to 100% on Radeon RX 7900 XTX.

title: Qualcomm introduces Dragonfly, its chip platform for AI in data centers
summary: Includes versions for China with reduced accelerator units to comply with export restrictions.

title: Qualcomm reveals HBC near-compute memory architecture for AI
summary: Achieves 6x more bandwidth per watt than HBM and 200x more capacity than on-chip SRAM.

title: Micron and Samsung drive the memory market with deals and record production
summary: Micron secures $100 billion in contracts, and Samsung focuses HBM production on HBM4.

title: CHUWI, AceMagic, and Geekom launch deals and new mini PCs
summary: The manufacturers present compact systems with AMD and Intel processors at competitive prices.

title: ASUS restores TSME support on AM5 motherboards via beta BIOS
summary: The update allows enabling TSME on X870, B850, and X670 series chipsets.

title: Nothing reveals final design of Phone (4b) with dual camera and LEDs
summary: The budget phone features a light blue finish and black buttons on its casing.

title: AMD fixes Adrenalin driver issues with an urgent hotfix
summary: Version 26.6.3 fixes installation errors on Windows 10 for Radeon RX 7000 GPUs.

title: Intel Arc Pro B65 arrives in the US from $909
summary: The professional GPU from ASRock and Intel offers fewer cores than the Pro B70 at a slightly lower price.

title: IBM announces a 7-angstrom chip with 100 billion transistors
summary: NanoStack technology promises 50% more performance than 2-nanometer processes.

title: Qualcomm and Meta sign a multi-year strategic agreement for data center CPUs
summary: Both companies will collaborate on designing processors for AI workloads.

title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 offers discounts on various technology
summary: Monitors, 3D printers, gaming chairs, and speakers are among the featured deals.

title: Tim Sweeney speaks out on the video game industry on two fronts
summary: He criticizes Valve for AI transparency and advocates for interconnected economies in games.

title: Ayaneo Pocket Micro 2 and MSI Claw 8, two bets on handheld consoles
summary: The company launches a new retro handheld while the definitive review of the Claw 8 is published.

title: Featured reviews: HyperX Cloud Stinger 3 and Creative XF1
summary: Wireless headphones and a desktop speaker offer good audio quality for under $100.

title: NVIDIA updates DLSS and Proton adds FSR 4 compatibility on Linux
summary: The upscaling technologies receive new versions to improve gaming performance.
